# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: default-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-authn
  namespace: default
spec:
  identities:
    - "*"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-server-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "*"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-all-authenticated
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-authn
  namespace: default
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-network
  namespace: default
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-unauthenticated
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: default-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: default-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: "/"
      backendRefs:
        - name: default-backend
          port: 8080

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: all-pods-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-same-namespace
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: all-pods-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - namespace: default
          name: "*"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-external
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: core
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
